headline: Walmart Revamps ‘Great Value’ Brand as Shoppers Shift to Lower-Priced Options
summary: Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) is included among the 10 Best Dow Stocks to Invest in Now. On April 15, Reuters reported that Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) is redesigning its private-label brand “Great Value” as more shoppers shift toward lower-priced store brands. The brand, first introduced in 1993, will see changes across nearly 10,000 food and consumables items. […]

headline: Walmart’s Private-Label and Store Modernization Push Might Change The Case For Investing In Walmart (WMT)
summary: In mid-April 2026, Walmart announced a sweeping refresh of its Great Value private-label packaging across nearly 10,000 items, expanded in-store offerings from partners like Pet Honesty and Lucky Energy, and continued store and marketplace modernization efforts including same-day delivery staging in back rooms. Together, these moves highlight Walmart’s push to sharpen value perception, deepen customer loyalty, and commercialize its logistics and service capabilities well beyond traditional...
